Process:         myapp [999]
Call graph:
    100 Thread_1   DispatchQueue_1: com.apple.main-thread  (serial)
    + 100 start  (in dyld) + 6992  [0x100000000]
    +   100 main  (in myapp) + 39  [0x100000100]
    +     60 foo  (in myapp) + 12  [0x100000200]
    +       40 bar  (in myapp) + 8  [0x100000300]
    +     40 baz  (in libwork) + 4  [0x180000400]

    + 30 thread_start  (in libsystem) + 10  [0x180000000]
